Home / Lore / Locations / Capitol Hill

location

Capitol Hill

The True Sons strongpoint where President Ellis and the encryption key needed to reach the broad-spectrum antiviral are held.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Campaign turning point

Retaking Capitol Hill appears to complete the struggle against the True Sons and unlock the route to the antiviral, but it immediately precedes the Black Tusk siege. [1]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The True Sons hold President Ellis and his encryption key at Capitol Hill. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Division Agents rescue Ellis and retake Capitol Hill from the True Sons before Black Tusk enters Washington. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: This page records the narrative location; an objective-level Capitol Building mission record remains pending direct capture.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
